productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Printed Red Jackets
description: Composition Red hooded jacket made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, hood with drawstring and grey lining, zippered closure on the front, mock inner grey front panel with attached hood and zippered closure, patch pockets on the sides of the outer shell with openings on the sides, overlock stitch detailing, distressed look graphic print on the front and ribbed hemline with appliqued brand detailing on the left hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Line dry inside-out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Warm and rugged is the perfect way to describe this red hooded jacket from status quo. The rugged print and overlock stitch detailing bring in a masculine edge, while the mock grey panel in the front gives extra warmth. Crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team this with t-shirts and jeans. Model statistics The model wears size M in jackets Height: 6', Shoulders: 19"
